summary: Iteration 18: Comprehensive testing of new GIMO features - Global search, role-based access, admin dashboard, avatar dropdown, back button styling. 14/14 backend tests passed. All critical frontend features working. One minor UI issue: Footer shows 'Publier une annonce' link to all users (but route protection works).

ui_bugs.issue: Footer shows 'Publier une annonce' and 'Mes annonces' links to all users including auteurs. Route protection correctly redirects them, but links shouldn't be visible.

backend_api: GET /api/search - Global search endpoint returns articles, properties, procedures
GET /api/search?q= (empty) - Returns empty results for empty query
POST /api/articles (auteur token) - Returns 200 (auteur can create articles)
POST /api/properties (agent token) - Returns 200 (agent can create properties)
GET /api/admin/notifications - Returns notifications list with pending_count
New user registration creates admin notification for role approval
Article creation works with proper structure (broadcast_all is internal)
Property creation works with proper structure (broadcast_all is internal)
frontend_ui: Global search bar visible in header
Search shows dropdown with 'Articles' section for query 'Simandou'
Admin avatar dropdown opens on click
Dropdown shows Dashboard, Sauvegardes, Parametres, Deconnexion links
Admin bell notification visible in header
Admin database page shows Requests tab with CSV button
Status filter dropdown (Tous, En attente, Approuvé, Rejeté) works
Pending requests banner shows '1 demande en attente d'approbation'
APPROUVER and REJETER buttons visible for pending requests
ImmobilierPage hides 'Publier une annonce' button for auteur role (in main content)

action_items: MINOR: Footer.js (lines 75-76) - Consider hiding 'Publier une annonce' and 'Mes annonces' links from non-agent/admin users, similar to how ImmobilierPage does it
critical_code_review_comments: Global search /api/search properly queries articles, properties, procedures with regex
Role-based middleware require_agent correctly excludes 'auteur' role
WebSocket broadcast_all method in ConnectionManager works for content_update events
new_role_request WebSocket event sent to admin on user registration (auth.py lines 170-177)
AgentRoute in App.js correctly blocks auteur from agent-only pages
ImmobilierPage.js canPublish logic correct: user?.role === 'agent' || user?.role === 'admin'
Header.js avatar dropdown includes Profil link with proper navigation
Back buttons use icon-only (ArrowLeft) without 'Retour' text
seed_data_creation: Created TEST_auteur_iter18_* and TEST_agent_iter18_* users during pytest. Admin approved them for role-based access testing.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 18 validated: (1) Global search working with articles/properties/procedures, (2) Role-based access - auteur cannot POST properties (403), agent cannot POST articles (403), (3) AgentRoute redirects auteur away from /immobilier/publier and /mes-annonces, (4) Admin bell notification navigates to /admin/database, (5) Avatar dropdown has Profil link, (6) Back buttons icon-only. Minor issue: Footer shows links to all users but route protection works. Admin credentials: matrixguinea@gmail.com / strongpassword123.

websocket_features.content_broadcast: Code review confirms broadcast_all called in articles.py (line 136, 160) and properties.py (line 109, 135) after create/update
websocket_features.new_role_request: Code review confirms manager.send_to_user sent to admin(s) on registration (auth.py lines 170-177)
websocket_features.role_update: WebSocketContext.js handles role_update with redirect logic - agent→/immobilier, auteur→/admin

mocked_apis_list: Resend Email Service - OTP returned as dev_otp in API response
